mapper.select: SELECT menu_id, menu_name, price, duration_minutes, description, use_yn FROM nail_menu
SELECT menu_id, menu_name, price, duration_minutes, description, use_yn FROM nail_menu WHERE use_yn = 'Y'
SELECT menu_id, menu_name, price, duration_minutes, description, use_yn FROM nail_menu WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO nail_menu (menu_name, price, duration_minutes, description, use_yn) VALUES ( #{menuName}, #{price}, #{durationMinutes}, #{description}, #{useYn} )
mapper.update: UPDATE nail_menu SET menu_name = #{menuName}, price = #{price}, duration_minutes = #{durationMinutes}, description = #{description}, use_yn = #{useYn} WHERE menu_id = #{menuId}
